evidence_direction_note: SUPERSEDED 2026-04-23. Metric (mean_random_residue - mean_hippo_residue) is confounded in resource-hazard-colocated envs: residue RBFs accumulate at cells the agent visits during harm (goal-adjacent in this env), so a correctly goal-directed hippocampus produces trajectories that TRAVERSE residue-dense regions by design. Random E2 rollouts wander near current z_world, mostly residue-sparse. The negative hippo_quality_gap therefore reflects goal-seeking, not harm-seeking. Behavioural evidence for ARC-007 remains via EXQ-114 (99.2% harm reduction MAP_NAV vs MAP_ABLATED). Metric-redesign successor: V3-EXQ-397d (matched-endpoint residue comparison).
